findings.impact: Increases JS payload and compile time on coding/interview routes
findings.recommendation: Keep Monaco dynamic-import only on /coding routes; never in interview shell

findings.impact: Increases JS payload and compile time on coding/interview routes
findings.recommendation: Keep Monaco dynamic-import only on /coding routes; never in interview shell

findings.issue: submitAnswer blocks on full LLM evaluation before response
findings.impact: Voice/panel submit feels frozen during processing phase
findings.recommendation: Split into fast ack (200ms) + background evaluation websocket/poll
Investigate cold start / DB connection pool

findings.impact: Blocks SystemStatusBanner on every dashboard page
findings.recommendation: Cache status 60s client-side; load banner after paint

findings.impact: Increases JS payload and compile time on coding/interview routes
findings.recommendation: Lazy-load framer-motion in sidebar; use CSS transitions where possible

findings.impact: Increases JS payload and compile time on coding/interview routes
findings.recommendation: Lazy-load framer-motion in sidebar; use CSS transitions where possible

findings.issue: Deep Prisma includes on panel submit (turns + panelMembers + resume)
findings.recommendation: Select only fields needed for turn; paginate turns; index sessionId+timestamp

findings.impact: Session cache and rate limits bypassed; repeated cold DB hits
findings.recommendation: Enable Redis for session cache; cache panel session state between turns

findings.issue: Dashboard shell fires session fetch + onboarding + feedback widget on every page
findings.impact: 3–5 parallel API calls before feature content renders
findings.recommendation: Defer non-critical widgets; SWR cache session; skeleton-first render

findings.issue: React Strict Mode double-mounts panel/voice init in dev
findings.recommendation: Use initRef guard (implemented in panel); extend to all session inits

findings.issue: .next build cache present — run `next build` for accurate route sizes
findings.impact: Cannot measure production bundle without build

findings.issue: WHISPER_URL and XTTS_URL default to localhost — offline in most dev setups
findings.impact: Falls back to browser STT/TTS (acceptable) but adds confusion
findings.recommendation: Show capability banner once; pre-warm browser voices on interview entry
